name: Narrow Weapons: Any Combination of 3 Weapons

system.description:
Narrow selection (vii): any combination of 3 weapons. List the three on the effect's weaponProf change (comma-separated weapon names). Composite/long bow require short bow; spear/pole arm require javelin.

Class training chunk — Judges Journal pp. 290–291. Grant the chunks the character's class actually bought with its Fighting Value.
